title: Amir Ban
text: Home * People * Amir Ban Amir Ban with Shannon Trophy , WCCC 2013 [1] Amir Ban , an Israeli computer scientist with a Ph.D. in Rationality from The Hebrew University of Jerusalem , Givat Ram [2] in 2008, and computer chess programmer. Along with Shay Bushinsky , Amir Ban is primary author of the world class chess engine and multiple computer chess world champion Junior and its multiprocessor version Deep Junior . Amir started chess programming in 1985. Junior's predecessor was written in Turbo Pascal , later ported to C and C++ . In 1993, Shay joined Amir's programming efforts, specializing in evaluation and optimisation [3] .
